name: Compact Operators & Spectral Theory
description: Compact: T(B) relatively compact. Riesz: spectrum of compact T is 0 plus eigenvalues. Fredholm alternative. Spectral theorem for compact self-adjoint.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Compact operator\nT(B) compact"]
    D2["Def: Spectrum σT\nλ: T−λI not invertible"]
    D3["Def: Resolvent set ρT"]
    T1["Thm: T compact ⇒\nT bounded"]
    T2["Thm: Riesz–Schauder\nσT = {0} ∪ {λⱼ}\nλⱼ→0 eigenvalues"]
    T3["Thm: Fredholm alternative\n(T−λI)x=y solvable\n⇔ (T*−λ̄I)ϕ=0 trivial"]
    T4["Thm: Spectral thm\nT compact self-adjoint\nT = Σ λⱼ ⟨·,eⱼ⟩ eⱼ"]
    T5["Thm: Hilbert–Schmidt\n∫∫|K|² &lt ∞"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D1 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    T2 --> T4
    D1 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
